measurements: Rectangular base length to width ratio is 10:8.
Lotiform base width is 1.5 times pillar module.
Lotiform base width is twice its height.
Pitha summit width is 7/8 of its base width.
Muhurtastambha summit diameter is 9/10 of base diameter.
Gnomon base diameter is 5 times top diameter.
Pattika height is a quarter of a module.
Pattika width is double its thickness.
Padmapattika width is 3/4 of door jamb thickness.
Door lath thickness is half leaf thickness.
Upana projection is 2/3 of janman projection.
